calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Continued To Mar-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (145 Brewster St., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-03-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Elizabeth Thomas (Executor).

The Court stated that notice was not given to the City and County of San Francisco but Ms. Ng brought in a waiver of special notice by the City and County of San Francisco today so the sale can go forward. There being no overbids, the sale was confirmed at $410,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Elizabeth Thomas.

The Court stated that before it today was the petition for probate of the lost will and co-dicil, that it had reviewed the filings, and that all appeared to be in order. The Court granted the petition (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Mary Wiss. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.
